top.title: Iran using children in security roles in war, reports and witnesses say
top.summary: An 11-year-old is reported to have been killed in an air strike while manning a checkpoint in Tehran.

top.title: Israel says it will keep control over part of southern Lebanon after war with Hezbollah ends
top.summary: Defence Minister Israel Katz also says houses in Lebanese villages near the Israeli border will be demolished.

top.title: China bans storing cremated remains in empty 'bone ash apartments'
top.summary: China bans 'bone ash apartments' where mourners are storing cremated remains instead of cemeteries.

top.title: Social media firms must better enforce Australia under-16 ban, watchdog says
top.summary: Regulator eSafety says it has concerns about how Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube are complying with the ban.

top.title: Kris Jenner's image spreads in Chinese social media good luck trend
top.summary: Hundreds of thousands of posts have been shared in the past three days as users hope for prosperity

top.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
top.summary: More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.
